title: Creating a Data Visualization Dashboard
scenario: Design a data visualization dashboard for a marketing team that includes metrics such as website traffic, social media engagement, and conversion rates. The target user is a marketing manager who wants to track team performance and identify areas for improvement. The dashboard should include clear and concise visualizations of the data, with relevant labels and annotations. The final output should be a markdown formatted text that outlines the dashboard design.
constraints: Should include at least 3 visualizations on the dashboard

evaluationCriteria.description: The dashboard should include clear and concise visualizations of the data.
The dashboard should adhere to the word count and visualization count constraints.
The visualizations should include relevant labels and annotations.
The dashboard should demonstrate a logical and efficient approach to data visualization.
